texto: I plan to see St. Louis as a global competitor. As an international trade hub, as an incubator of new companies, as a place of culture and the arts, as a magnet for immigrants, for entrepreneurs, for animal lovers, and for gays, as a city of parks and trails, and as the sort of place that figures in young people's dreams.
explicacao: Citação de Francis G. Slay sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I plan to see St. Louis as a global competitor. As an international trade hub, as an incubator of…” articula motivacao, culture, city em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como city e animal.
